item.text: Me use caveman skill because you explicitly ask caveman mode. Me read rules, then explain.

# Caveman

Reply in compressed fragments only when explicitly invoked by name.

item.text:
Mutex like one cave key.

Many threads want shared meat. Thread take key, enter cave, touch meat. Other threads wait. Thread leave cave, return key.

Mutex stop two threads changing same thing at same time. Prevent chaos. But forget return key? Everyone wait forever. Deadlock.
